topic.name: 全球治理与外交
topic.description: 追踪国际组织、峰会、制裁、谈判与地缘关系变化
topic.query: diplomacy international relations summit sanctions United Nations

overview: 今日专题“全球治理与外交”。共筛选 23 个高价值事件，重点关注中国相关进展、美国相关进展及全球外交、经济与安全动态。

featured.title: 美指月之暗面窃取美企AI技术 或列贸易黑名单制裁
featured.titleZh: 美指月之暗面窃取美企AI技术 或列贸易黑名单制裁
featured.summaryZh: 美国指控中国人工智能公司“月之暗面”窃取美国企业技术。美方正考虑将其列入贸易黑名单以实施制裁。
featured.whyImportant: 此举是美中科技竞争加剧的体现，可能对全球人工智能产业的供应链和合作产生深远影响。

featured.title: Ukraine’s new military chief pledges to escalate retaliation against Russia
featured.summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov is due to meet US counterpart Marco Rubio, but progress towards peace unlikely.
featured.titleZh: 乌克兰新任军事首长承诺升级对俄报复
featured.summaryZh: 乌克兰新任军事领导人誓言加大对俄罗斯的报复力度。与此同时，俄罗斯外长拉夫罗夫计划与美国国务卿卢比奥会晤，但外界普遍认为和平进程难以取得实质进展。
featured.whyImportant: 乌克兰军事战略的调整预示着冲突可能进一步升级，外交斡旋的空间依然有限。

featured.title: New Ukraine army chief vows to step up counteroffensive as EU bids to finalise fresh Russia sanctions – as it happened
featured.summary: Brussels talks between senior diplomats now underway in attempt to sign off 21st package of sanctions, after previous failed attempts The Venice Biennale said it would challenge a European Union decision to withdraw a €2 ⁠million grant in response to the return of Russia to its 2026 edition, despite continuing aggression on Ukraine, Reuters reported. The Italian government sharply criticised the move, while the European Commission warned it ​would suspend or terminate funding if the Russian ‌pavilion returned. Continue reading...
featured.titleZh: 乌克兰新任陆军首长誓言加强反攻，欧盟力争敲定对俄新制裁——直播回顾
featured.summaryZh: 欧盟外交官正试图签署第21轮对俄制裁方案。同时，威尼斯双年展因俄罗斯馆回归而面临欧盟撤资的威胁。
featured.whyImportant: 欧盟在制裁问题上的持续努力和文化领域的争议，反映了西方对俄政策的复杂性。

featured.title: Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission, a National Mission on AI for Science
featured.summary: WASHINGTON, DC — Today, Assistant to the President and Director of the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy Michael Kratsios unveiled more than $5 billion in Federal commitments expanding the Genesis Mission alongside new mission-driven National Science and Technology Challenges. Tune in to the Genesis Mission 2026 Summit live on July 22, 2026 […] The post Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission, a National Mission on AI for Science appeared first on The White House.
featured.titleZh: 特朗普政府宣布为“创世纪任务”投入超过50亿美元，这是一项国家科学人工智能任务
featured.summaryZh: 白宫宣布投入超过50亿美元用于“创世纪任务”，旨在推动人工智能在科学领域的应用。该计划包含多项国家级科技挑战。
featured.whyImportant: 大规模的联邦资金投入显示了美国政府在人工智能科学研究领域保持全球领先地位的决心。

featured.title: Griffiths: Diplomacy requires US and Iran to accept they have ‘lost‘
featured.summary: Griffiths: Diplomacy requires US and Iran to accept they have ‘lost‘
featured.titleZh: 格里菲斯：外交需要美国和伊朗承认他们已经“输了”
featured.summaryZh: 格里菲斯认为，当前的外交僵局要求美国和伊朗双方承认在冲突中均未获益，从而寻求新的解决路径。
featured.whyImportant: 这一观点呼吁双方放弃零和博弈思维，为缓解中东紧张局势提供了外交视角。

global.title: Australia news live: Husic says Labor must show ‘it’s got steel in the spine’ on gas export tax after PM resists policy change
global.summary: Follow live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Self-reported domestic violence incidents declining in NSW but deaths and hospitalisations fail to fall New data shows self-reported domestic violence incidents in New South Wales have declined, but the number of women and children murdered or hospitalised in domestic and family violence incidents over the past eight years has not significantly budged. The decline in self-reported violence is significant because it reflects underlying levels of violence in the community, not just what is reported to police. It suggests that, despite rising reports of domestic violence to police, domestic violence in the community is not increasing and may be trending down. There’s a strong perception that violence against women is rising, which is understandable given increases in police-recorded incidents, heightened media attention and greater public awareness. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：胡西克称工党在天然气出口税问题上必须展现“钢铁脊梁”，此前总理抵制政策变更
global.summaryZh: 新南威尔士州数据显示，自述家庭暴力事件有所下降，但过去八年内因家暴导致死亡或住院的妇女和儿童人数并未显著减少。尽管警方记录的案件有所增加，但社区层面的暴力趋势可能正在放缓。
global.whyImportant: 该数据揭示了警方记录与社区实际暴力水平之间的差异，引发了关于政府在处理家暴问题上应采取更强硬政策的讨论。

global.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
global.summary: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.
global.titleZh: 胡塞武装声称袭击油轮，美国对伊朗发动更多打击
global.summaryZh: 胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”，此次袭击是该组织宣布禁运以来在红海采取的首次行动。美国随后加大了对伊朗相关目标的军事打击力度。
global.whyImportant: 红海局势升级加剧了中东地区的航运风险，并进一步恶化了美伊之间的紧张关系。

global.title: Trump tariffs news : Senator issues appeal to trade czar on Canada
global.titleZh: 特朗普关税新闻：参议员就加拿大问题向贸易沙皇提出上诉
global.summaryZh: 相关报道涉及特朗普政府的关税政策，一名参议员正就针对加拿大的贸易措施向负责贸易的官员寻求干预或解释。
global.whyImportant: 此举反映了美国贸易保护主义政策对北美贸易伙伴关系产生的持续压力。

global.title: House Democrat calls for congressional hearings on Trump administration’s nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia – as it happened
global.summary: This live blog is now closed. US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia Sign up for the Breaking News US email A reminder that my colleagues are covering the latest out of the Middle East at our dedicated live blog. Donald Trump took to Truth Social a short while and noted that the US will destroy one bridge or power plant, including those near Tehran, “any time” that Iran “shoots a ship” in the strait of Hormuz. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 众议院民主党人呼吁就特朗普政府与沙特阿拉伯的核协议举行国会听证会
global.summaryZh: 美国与沙特签署了一项具有里程碑意义的核协议，引发众议院民主党人要求进行国会审查。与此同时，特朗普威胁称若伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡的船只，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的桥梁或发电厂。
global.whyImportant: 该核协议及特朗普的强硬言论标志着美国中东政策的重大转变，引发了国会内部的政治博弈。

global.title: 美指月之暗面窃取美企AI技术 或列贸易黑名单制裁
global.titleZh: 美指月之暗面窃取美企AI技术 或列贸易黑名单制裁
global.summaryZh: 美国指控中国人工智能公司“月之暗面”窃取美国企业技术。美方正考虑将其列入贸易黑名单以实施制裁。
global.whyImportant: 此举是美中科技竞争加剧的体现，可能对全球人工智能产业的供应链和合作产生深远影响。

global.title: 推动体育强国建设全面提速提质 国家体育总局解读 《 体育强国建设 十五五 规划 》 - 即时新闻
global.titleZh: 推动体育强国建设全面提速提质 国家体育总局解读《体育强国建设十五五规划》
global.summaryZh: 国家体育总局对《体育强国建设十五五规划》进行了解读，旨在全面提升中国体育事业的发展质量与速度。规划重点在于推动体育产业升级及全民健身的普及。
global.whyImportant: 该规划为中国未来五年体育事业的发展设定了战略目标，体现了国家对体育产业的重视。

global.title: Ukraine’s strikes on ‘Russia’s Amazon’ bring war closer to ordinary Russians
global.summary: ⁠From humble origins as a family business run out of an ⁠apartment near Moscow, Wildberries has grown in under two decades into Russia’s top online retailer and a key economic driver in the country. It has now become a target of strikes by Ukraine. Ukraine has attacked four Wildberries warehouses over the last week in a widening campaign of drone strikes against a company at the heart of Russia’s consumer economy, bringing the war closer to millions of ordinary Russians. In towns across Russia,...
global.titleZh: 乌克兰袭击“俄罗斯的亚马逊”，将战争带给普通俄罗斯人
global.summaryZh: 乌克兰近期对俄罗斯顶级在线零售商Wildberries的四个仓库发动了无人机袭击。这一行动将战争的影响直接延伸至俄罗斯消费经济的核心，触及了普通民众的日常生活。
global.whyImportant: 乌克兰将打击目标转向俄罗斯核心商业基础设施，标志着战争手段的进一步升级。

global.title: Wounded Gaza journalists call for urgent medical evacuation
global.summary: Wounded and chronically ill Palestinian journalists held a protest calling for urgent medical evacuation from Gaza.
global.titleZh: 加沙受伤记者呼吁紧急医疗撤离
global.summaryZh: 加沙地带的受伤及患有慢性病的巴勒斯坦记者举行抗议，要求获得紧急医疗撤离许可。他们面临着医疗资源匮乏的严峻生存挑战。
global.whyImportant: 此事件凸显了加沙地区人道主义危机的严重性，以及战地新闻工作者面临的极端生存困境。

global.title: Ukraine’s new military chief pledges to escalate retaliation against Russia
global.summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov is due to meet US counterpart Marco Rubio, but progress towards peace unlikely.
global.titleZh: 乌克兰新任军事首长承诺升级对俄报复
global.summaryZh: 乌克兰新任军事领导人誓言加大对俄罗斯的报复力度。与此同时，俄罗斯外长拉夫罗夫计划与美国国务卿卢比奥会晤，但外界普遍认为和平进程难以取得实质进展。
global.whyImportant: 乌克兰军事战略的调整预示着冲突可能进一步升级，外交斡旋的空间依然有限。

global.title: Terrorism trial opens in stabbing of author Salman Rushdie
global.summary: The man convicted of trying to kill Salman Rushdie spent years researching the writer’s whereabouts before stabbing him on a lecture stage, federal prosecutors said Wednesday at the opening of his federal terrorism trial. It is a second trial for Hadi Matar, who was found guilty in a New York state attempted murder case last year. The federal terror charges focus more on Matar’s alleged motive for the attack on the renowned author and free-speech advocate in 2022. Prosecutors started working on...
global.titleZh: 萨尔曼·拉什迪遇刺案恐怖主义审判开庭
global.summaryZh: 针对萨尔曼·拉什迪遇刺案的联邦恐怖主义审判正式开庭。被告哈迪·马塔尔此前已在州法院被判谋杀未遂，此次联邦审判将重点审查其袭击动机。
global.whyImportant: 该案涉及言论自由与极端主义暴力，在法律界和公众舆论中具有高度关注度。

china.title: Why China’s polar expedition to the Arctic Ocean has drawn US ire
china.summary: The United States Coast Guard said it closely tracked Chinese polar expedition vessels transiting the Bering Sea on their way to the Arctic Ocean last week, amid unease over Beijing’s geopolitical ambitions in the region. The US Coast Guard Cutter Munro actively monitored the Chinese research ships Xuelong and Xuelong 2 as they passed northbound through the US exclusive economic zone (EEZ) and extended continental shelf in the Bering Sea towards the Arctic, the US Coast Guard said last...
china.titleZh: 为什么中国的北极科考引起了美国的愤怒
china.summaryZh: 美国海岸警卫队密切监视了中国“雪龙”号和“雪龙2”号科考船在白令海的航行。美方对中国在北极地区的战略意图表示担忧。
china.whyImportant: 北极地区的科考活动已成为美中地缘政治博弈的新焦点。

china.title: Time for deeper, detailed exchanges between Hong Kong and mainland Chinese courts
china.summary: One of the main features of the “one country, two systems” principle is that, despite our physical proximity, Hong Kong has a very different set of laws from those of mainland China. Very often, we talk about our differences when explaining the system to one another. But at heart, both legal systems seek to deliver justice in real-life situations. Indeed, our connections with the Chinese mainland, in particular the Greater Bay Area, are growing closer every day. Many economic and commercial...
china.titleZh: 香港与中国内地法院之间需要更深入、详细的交流
china.summaryZh: 文章指出，尽管香港与内地法律体系不同，但随着大湾区经济联系的加深，双方在司法领域的交流变得日益重要。加强两地司法互助有助于更好地解决实际法律问题。
china.whyImportant: 深化司法交流是促进大湾区一体化发展和保障跨境商业活动的关键环节。

china.title: Chinese doctor wades through severe floodwaters to reach patients, winning widespread praise
china.summary: A man in northeastern China who was filmed pushing his bicycle through deep water on his way to work amid torrential rain has trended on social media. The video triggered an outpouring of emotion after internet users learned that the man was a doctor who had appointments to perform surgery on two patients that day, state news agency Xinhua reported. It was on July 13 when Shenyang, in Liaoning province, was hit by a serious downpour, with precipitation measuring 230mm. The local government...
china.titleZh: 中国医生冒雨涉水前往医院救治患者，赢得广泛赞誉
china.summaryZh: 辽宁沈阳遭遇严重暴雨期间，一名医生推着自行车在深水中前行前往医院进行手术的视频在社交媒体上走红。这一举动展现了医务工作者的职业操守，引发了公众的强烈共鸣。
china.whyImportant: 该事件在社交媒体上引发了对医护人员奉献精神的广泛讨论与赞扬。

china.title: China’s cyberscam crackdown pushed syndicates to target Americans, analysts say
china.summary: Criminal syndicates increasingly turned from targeting Chinese nationals to Americans after Beijing’s 2023 crackdown on online scams in Southeast Asia, analysts said on Wednesday, triggering a global game of “whack-a-mole”. “China has a huge advantage and a head start in terms of trying to protect its own citizens from scams compared to the US,” said Sue-Lin Wong, who hosts the Scam Inc. podcast, adding that it is “terrible for Americans who are losing a lot of money”. In recent years, Southeast...
china.titleZh: 分析人士称，中国的网络诈骗打击行动迫使犯罪集团将目标转向美国人
china.summaryZh: 分析人士指出，自中国2023年对东南亚网络诈骗进行严厉打击后，犯罪集团已将目标转向美国公民。这种全球性的诈骗活动给美国受害者造成了巨大经济损失。
china.whyImportant: 跨国网络犯罪的转移凸显了全球打击网络诈骗行动中存在的监管漏洞。

china.title: ‘No time to be a detective’: medics warn of split-second calls under new end-of-life law
china.summary: Hong Kong’s new legislation on end-of-life directives could create significant operational challenges, including verifying patients’ wishes in emergencies and affordability barriers for low-income families, according to frontline responders and patient advocates. The warnings come a week before the Advance Decision on Life-sustaining Treatment Ordinance takes effect next Friday. Under the law, a formal legal framework will empower Hongkongers to specify in advance which life-sustaining...
china.titleZh: “没时间当侦探”：医护人员警告新安乐死法案下的瞬时决策压力
china.summaryZh: 香港即将实施《预设医疗指示条例》，一线医护人员对此表示担忧。他们认为在紧急情况下核实患者意愿存在操作难度，且该法案可能给低收入家庭带来经济负担。
china.whyImportant: 新法案的实施对医疗系统的应急响应能力和伦理决策提出了新的挑战。

usa.title: Yemen’s Houthis claim attacks on Red Sea tankers as US launches 12th night of strikes on Iran – Middle East crisis live
usa.summary: US military says it is degrading Tehran’s ability to threaten ships in strait of Hormuz; Houthis say tankers violated their blockade; US signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia Earlier in the US day, before Iran’s Revolutionary Guard said it had stopped three oil tankers from passing through the strait of Hormuz, Donald Trump issued this threat on his Truth Social platform: From this point forward, any time the Islamic Republic of Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz, whether it be by Missile, Rocket, Drone, or any other device or weapon, the United States will bomb and destroy ONE BRIDGE OR POWER PLANT, including those located next to, or in, the Capital City of Tehran. Continue reading...
usa.titleZh: 也门胡塞武装声称袭击红海油轮，美国对伊朗发动第12晚打击——中东危机直播
usa.summaryZh: 美国军方表示正在削弱伊朗威胁霍尔木兹海峡航运的能力。胡塞武装声称袭击油轮是为了执行封锁，同时美国与沙特签署了核协议。
usa.whyImportant: 中东局势的复杂化和军事对抗的持续，对全球能源供应安全构成了直接威胁。

usa.title: Trump threatens to bomb Iranian bridge or power plant after Hormuz attacks
usa.summary: US President Donald Trump threatened on Wednesday to destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant each time Tehran attacks a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating Washington’s response as the conflict spread across the region and placed another major shipping route at risk. The warning came hours before Trump was due to attend the return of four US service members killed in Iranian attacks and related operations in Jordan and Iraq. “From this point forward, any time the Islamic Republic of Iran...
usa.titleZh: 特朗普威胁称，在霍尔木兹海峡袭击事件后将轰炸伊朗桥梁或发电厂
usa.summaryZh: 特朗普威胁称，伊朗每袭击一次霍尔木兹海峡的船只，美国就将摧毁伊朗的一座桥梁或发电厂。此言论进一步加剧了地区紧张局势。
usa.whyImportant: 美国总统的直接军事威胁标志着美伊对抗进入了更加危险的阶段。

usa.title: US tariffs ‘strengthen’ Lula against Bolsonaro’s son in upcoming elections
usa.summary: With Lula polling ahead and tariffs squeezing Brazil's economy, the Bolsonaro family's Washington strategy is faltering.
usa.titleZh: 美国关税“加强”了卢拉在即将到来的选举中对抗博索纳罗之子的地位
usa.summaryZh: 由于美国关税政策对巴西经济造成压力，博索纳罗家族的对美策略受到质疑。民调显示卢拉目前处于领先地位。
usa.whyImportant: 外部贸易压力正在重塑巴西国内的政治格局和选举走向。

usa.title: South Korea charges former US diplomat with defaming Lee Jae Myung
usa.summary: South Korean prosecutors have charged Korean-American professor Morse Tan for criminal defamation over false claims targeting President Lee Jae Myung. The Seoul Central District Prosecutors’ Office reportedly indicted Tan without detention on Thursday on multiple defamation charges. Tan, who served as the US ambassador-at-large for global criminal justice under the first Donald Trump administration, is accused of spreading false allegations during a press conference in Washington last year. He...
usa.titleZh: 韩国指控前美国外交官诽谤李在明
usa.summaryZh: 韩国检察机关以刑事诽谤罪起诉了韩裔美国教授莫尔斯·谭。他被指控在华盛顿的新闻发布会上散布针对李在明的虚假指控。
usa.whyImportant: 此案涉及跨国政治诽谤，对韩美政治关系及相关人物声誉产生了影响。

usa.title: Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission, a National Mission on AI for Science
usa.summary: WASHINGTON, DC — Today, Assistant to the President and Director of the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy Michael Kratsios unveiled more than $5 billion in Federal commitments expanding the Genesis Mission alongside new mission-driven National Science and Technology Challenges. Tune in to the Genesis Mission 2026 Summit live on July 22, 2026 […] The post Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission, a National Mission on AI for Science appeared first on The White House.
usa.titleZh: 特朗普政府宣布为“创世纪任务”投入超过50亿美元，这是一项国家科学人工智能任务
usa.summaryZh: 白宫宣布投入超过50亿美元用于“创世纪任务”，旨在推动人工智能在科学领域的应用。该计划包含多项国家级科技挑战。
usa.whyImportant: 大规模的联邦资金投入显示了美国政府在人工智能科学研究领域保持全球领先地位的决心。

watch.title: Scottish Labour’s rivals decry ‘chancer’ Anas Sarwar for resigning to join Andy Burnham’s government
watch.summary: New prime minister has made Sarwar – the first senior Labour figure to call for Keir Starmer’s resignation – a peer Scottish Labour’s rivals in Holyrood have slammed Anas Sarwar’s shock decision to resign as leader to sit in Andy Burnham’s new government, calling him a “chancer” and accusing him of lying to voters. The prime minister has made Sarwar – who was the first senior Labour figure to call for Keir Starmer to resign – a peer and given him a ministerial post at the Department for Business, Innovation, Science and Trade, No 10 announced on Wednesday. Continue reading...
watch.titleZh: 苏格兰工党竞争对手谴责阿纳斯·萨瓦尔辞职加入安迪·伯纳姆政府是“投机者”
watch.summaryZh: 阿纳斯·萨瓦尔辞去苏格兰工党领袖职务，加入安迪·伯纳姆的新政府并担任部长。此举遭到政敌的猛烈抨击，指责其欺骗选民。
watch.whyImportant: 这一人事变动引发了苏格兰政坛的剧烈震荡，并对工党的内部团结提出了质疑。

watch.title: New Ukraine army chief vows to step up counteroffensive as EU bids to finalise fresh Russia sanctions – as it happened
watch.summary: Brussels talks between senior diplomats now underway in attempt to sign off 21st package of sanctions, after previous failed attempts The Venice Biennale said it would challenge a European Union decision to withdraw a €2 ⁠million grant in response to the return of Russia to its 2026 edition, despite continuing aggression on Ukraine, Reuters reported. The Italian government sharply criticised the move, while the European Commission warned it ​would suspend or terminate funding if the Russian ‌pavilion returned. Continue reading...
watch.titleZh: 乌克兰新任陆军首长誓言加强反攻，欧盟力争敲定对俄新制裁——直播回顾
watch.summaryZh: 欧盟外交官正试图签署第21轮对俄制裁方案。同时，威尼斯双年展因俄罗斯馆回归而面临欧盟撤资的威胁。
watch.whyImportant: 欧盟在制裁问题上的持续努力和文化领域的争议，反映了西方对俄政策的复杂性。

watch.title: Griffiths: Diplomacy requires US and Iran to accept they have ‘lost‘
watch.summary: Griffiths: Diplomacy requires US and Iran to accept they have ‘lost‘
watch.titleZh: 格里菲斯：外交需要美国和伊朗承认他们已经“输了”
watch.summaryZh: 格里菲斯认为，当前的外交僵局要求美国和伊朗双方承认在冲突中均未获益，从而寻求新的解决路径。
watch.whyImportant: 这一观点呼吁双方放弃零和博弈思维，为缓解中东紧张局势提供了外交视角。

items.title: 美指月之暗面窃取美企AI技术 或列贸易黑名单制裁
items.titleZh: 美指月之暗面窃取美企AI技术 或列贸易黑名单制裁
items.summaryZh: 美国指控中国人工智能公司“月之暗面”窃取美国企业技术。美方正考虑将其列入贸易黑名单以实施制裁。
items.whyImportant: 此举是美中科技竞争加剧的体现，可能对全球人工智能产业的供应链和合作产生深远影响。

items.title: Ukraine’s new military chief pledges to escalate retaliation against Russia
items.summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov is due to meet US counterpart Marco Rubio, but progress towards peace unlikely.
items.titleZh: 乌克兰新任军事首长承诺升级对俄报复
items.summaryZh: 乌克兰新任军事领导人誓言加大对俄罗斯的报复力度。与此同时，俄罗斯外长拉夫罗夫计划与美国国务卿卢比奥会晤，但外界普遍认为和平进程难以取得实质进展。
items.whyImportant: 乌克兰军事战略的调整预示着冲突可能进一步升级，外交斡旋的空间依然有限。

items.summary: Brussels talks between senior diplomats now underway in attempt to sign off 21st package of sanctions, after previous failed attempts The Venice Biennale said it would challenge a European Union decision to withdraw a €2 ⁠million grant in response to the return of Russia to its 2026 edition, despite continuing aggression on Ukraine, Reuters reported. The Italian government sharply criticised the move, while the European Commission warned it ​would suspend or terminate funding if the Russian ‌pavilion returned. Continue reading...

items.title: Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission, a National Mission on AI for Science
items.summary: WASHINGTON, DC — Today, Assistant to the President and Director of the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy Michael Kratsios unveiled more than $5 billion in Federal commitments expanding the Genesis Mission alongside new mission-driven National Science and Technology Challenges. Tune in to the Genesis Mission 2026 Summit live on July 22, 2026 […] The post Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission, a National Mission on AI for Science appeared first on The White House.
items.titleZh: 特朗普政府宣布为“创世纪任务”投入超过50亿美元，这是一项国家科学人工智能任务
items.summaryZh: 白宫宣布投入超过50亿美元用于“创世纪任务”，旨在推动人工智能在科学领域的应用。该计划包含多项国家级科技挑战。
items.whyImportant: 大规模的联邦资金投入显示了美国政府在人工智能科学研究领域保持全球领先地位的决心。

items.title: Australia news live: Husic says Labor must show ‘it’s got steel in the spine’ on gas export tax after PM resists policy change
items.summary: Follow live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Self-reported domestic violence incidents declining in NSW but deaths and hospitalisations fail to fall New data shows self-reported domestic violence incidents in New South Wales have declined, but the number of women and children murdered or hospitalised in domestic and family violence incidents over the past eight years has not significantly budged. The decline in self-reported violence is significant because it reflects underlying levels of violence in the community, not just what is reported to police. It suggests that, despite rising reports of domestic violence to police, domestic violence in the community is not increasing and may be trending down. There’s a strong perception that violence against women is rising, which is understandable given increases in police-recorded incidents, heightened media attention and greater public awareness. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：胡西克称工党在天然气出口税问题上必须展现“钢铁脊梁”，此前总理抵制政策变更
items.summaryZh: 新南威尔士州数据显示，自述家庭暴力事件有所下降，但过去八年内因家暴导致死亡或住院的妇女和儿童人数并未显著减少。尽管警方记录的案件有所增加，但社区层面的暴力趋势可能正在放缓。
items.whyImportant: 该数据揭示了警方记录与社区实际暴力水平之间的差异，引发了关于政府在处理家暴问题上应采取更强硬政策的讨论。

items.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
items.summary: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.
items.titleZh: 胡塞武装声称袭击油轮，美国对伊朗发动更多打击
items.summaryZh: 胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”，此次袭击是该组织宣布禁运以来在红海采取的首次行动。美国随后加大了对伊朗相关目标的军事打击力度。
items.whyImportant: 红海局势升级加剧了中东地区的航运风险，并进一步恶化了美伊之间的紧张关系。

items.title: Trump tariffs news : Senator issues appeal to trade czar on Canada
items.titleZh: 特朗普关税新闻：参议员就加拿大问题向贸易沙皇提出上诉

items.whyImportant: 此举反映了美国贸易保护主义政策对北美贸易伙伴关系产生的持续压力。

items.title: House Democrat calls for congressional hearings on Trump administration’s nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia – as it happened
items.summary: This live blog is now closed. US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia Sign up for the Breaking News US email A reminder that my colleagues are covering the latest out of the Middle East at our dedicated live blog. Donald Trump took to Truth Social a short while and noted that the US will destroy one bridge or power plant, including those near Tehran, “any time” that Iran “shoots a ship” in the strait of Hormuz. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 众议院民主党人呼吁就特朗普政府与沙特阿拉伯的核协议举行国会听证会
items.summaryZh: 美国与沙特签署了一项具有里程碑意义的核协议，引发众议院民主党人要求进行国会审查。与此同时，特朗普威胁称若伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡的船只，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的桥梁或发电厂。
items.whyImportant: 该核协议及特朗普的强硬言论标志着美国中东政策的重大转变，引发了国会内部的政治博弈。

items.title: 推动体育强国建设全面提速提质 国家体育总局解读 《 体育强国建设 十五五 规划 》 - 即时新闻
items.titleZh: 推动体育强国建设全面提速提质 国家体育总局解读《体育强国建设十五五规划》
items.summaryZh: 国家体育总局对《体育强国建设十五五规划》进行了解读，旨在全面提升中国体育事业的发展质量与速度。规划重点在于推动体育产业升级及全民健身的普及。
items.whyImportant: 该规划为中国未来五年体育事业的发展设定了战略目标，体现了国家对体育产业的重视。

items.title: Ukraine’s strikes on ‘Russia’s Amazon’ bring war closer to ordinary Russians
items.summary: ⁠From humble origins as a family business run out of an ⁠apartment near Moscow, Wildberries has grown in under two decades into Russia’s top online retailer and a key economic driver in the country. It has now become a target of strikes by Ukraine. Ukraine has attacked four Wildberries warehouses over the last week in a widening campaign of drone strikes against a company at the heart of Russia’s consumer economy, bringing the war closer to millions of ordinary Russians. In towns across Russia,...
items.titleZh: 乌克兰袭击“俄罗斯的亚马逊”，将战争带给普通俄罗斯人
items.summaryZh: 乌克兰近期对俄罗斯顶级在线零售商Wildberries的四个仓库发动了无人机袭击。这一行动将战争的影响直接延伸至俄罗斯消费经济的核心，触及了普通民众的日常生活。
items.whyImportant: 乌克兰将打击目标转向俄罗斯核心商业基础设施，标志着战争手段的进一步升级。

items.title: Wounded Gaza journalists call for urgent medical evacuation
items.summary: Wounded and chronically ill Palestinian journalists held a protest calling for urgent medical evacuation from Gaza.
items.titleZh: 加沙受伤记者呼吁紧急医疗撤离
items.summaryZh: 加沙地带的受伤及患有慢性病的巴勒斯坦记者举行抗议，要求获得紧急医疗撤离许可。他们面临着医疗资源匮乏的严峻生存挑战。
items.whyImportant: 此事件凸显了加沙地区人道主义危机的严重性，以及战地新闻工作者面临的极端生存困境。

items.title: Terrorism trial opens in stabbing of author Salman Rushdie
items.summary: The man convicted of trying to kill Salman Rushdie spent years researching the writer’s whereabouts before stabbing him on a lecture stage, federal prosecutors said Wednesday at the opening of his federal terrorism trial. It is a second trial for Hadi Matar, who was found guilty in a New York state attempted murder case last year. The federal terror charges focus more on Matar’s alleged motive for the attack on the renowned author and free-speech advocate in 2022. Prosecutors started working on...
items.titleZh: 萨尔曼·拉什迪遇刺案恐怖主义审判开庭
items.summaryZh: 针对萨尔曼·拉什迪遇刺案的联邦恐怖主义审判正式开庭。被告哈迪·马塔尔此前已在州法院被判谋杀未遂，此次联邦审判将重点审查其袭击动机。
items.whyImportant: 该案涉及言论自由与极端主义暴力，在法律界和公众舆论中具有高度关注度。

items.title: Why China’s polar expedition to the Arctic Ocean has drawn US ire
items.summary: The United States Coast Guard said it closely tracked Chinese polar expedition vessels transiting the Bering Sea on their way to the Arctic Ocean last week, amid unease over Beijing’s geopolitical ambitions in the region. The US Coast Guard Cutter Munro actively monitored the Chinese research ships Xuelong and Xuelong 2 as they passed northbound through the US exclusive economic zone (EEZ) and extended continental shelf in the Bering Sea towards the Arctic, the US Coast Guard said last...
items.titleZh: 为什么中国的北极科考引起了美国的愤怒
items.summaryZh: 美国海岸警卫队密切监视了中国“雪龙”号和“雪龙2”号科考船在白令海的航行。美方对中国在北极地区的战略意图表示担忧。
items.whyImportant: 北极地区的科考活动已成为美中地缘政治博弈的新焦点。

items.title: Time for deeper, detailed exchanges between Hong Kong and mainland Chinese courts
items.summary: One of the main features of the “one country, two systems” principle is that, despite our physical proximity, Hong Kong has a very different set of laws from those of mainland China. Very often, we talk about our differences when explaining the system to one another. But at heart, both legal systems seek to deliver justice in real-life situations. Indeed, our connections with the Chinese mainland, in particular the Greater Bay Area, are growing closer every day. Many economic and commercial...
items.titleZh: 香港与中国内地法院之间需要更深入、详细的交流
items.summaryZh: 文章指出，尽管香港与内地法律体系不同，但随着大湾区经济联系的加深，双方在司法领域的交流变得日益重要。加强两地司法互助有助于更好地解决实际法律问题。
items.whyImportant: 深化司法交流是促进大湾区一体化发展和保障跨境商业活动的关键环节。

items.title: Chinese doctor wades through severe floodwaters to reach patients, winning widespread praise
items.summary: A man in northeastern China who was filmed pushing his bicycle through deep water on his way to work amid torrential rain has trended on social media. The video triggered an outpouring of emotion after internet users learned that the man was a doctor who had appointments to perform surgery on two patients that day, state news agency Xinhua reported. It was on July 13 when Shenyang, in Liaoning province, was hit by a serious downpour, with precipitation measuring 230mm. The local government...
items.titleZh: 中国医生冒雨涉水前往医院救治患者，赢得广泛赞誉
items.summaryZh: 辽宁沈阳遭遇严重暴雨期间，一名医生推着自行车在深水中前行前往医院进行手术的视频在社交媒体上走红。这一举动展现了医务工作者的职业操守，引发了公众的强烈共鸣。
items.whyImportant: 该事件在社交媒体上引发了对医护人员奉献精神的广泛讨论与赞扬。

items.title: China’s cyberscam crackdown pushed syndicates to target Americans, analysts say
items.summary: Criminal syndicates increasingly turned from targeting Chinese nationals to Americans after Beijing’s 2023 crackdown on online scams in Southeast Asia, analysts said on Wednesday, triggering a global game of “whack-a-mole”. “China has a huge advantage and a head start in terms of trying to protect its own citizens from scams compared to the US,” said Sue-Lin Wong, who hosts the Scam Inc. podcast, adding that it is “terrible for Americans who are losing a lot of money”. In recent years, Southeast...
items.titleZh: 分析人士称，中国的网络诈骗打击行动迫使犯罪集团将目标转向美国人
items.summaryZh: 分析人士指出，自中国2023年对东南亚网络诈骗进行严厉打击后，犯罪集团已将目标转向美国公民。这种全球性的诈骗活动给美国受害者造成了巨大经济损失。
items.whyImportant: 跨国网络犯罪的转移凸显了全球打击网络诈骗行动中存在的监管漏洞。

items.title: ‘No time to be a detective’: medics warn of split-second calls under new end-of-life law
items.summary: Hong Kong’s new legislation on end-of-life directives could create significant operational challenges, including verifying patients’ wishes in emergencies and affordability barriers for low-income families, according to frontline responders and patient advocates. The warnings come a week before the Advance Decision on Life-sustaining Treatment Ordinance takes effect next Friday. Under the law, a formal legal framework will empower Hongkongers to specify in advance which life-sustaining...
items.titleZh: “没时间当侦探”：医护人员警告新安乐死法案下的瞬时决策压力
items.summaryZh: 香港即将实施《预设医疗指示条例》，一线医护人员对此表示担忧。他们认为在紧急情况下核实患者意愿存在操作难度，且该法案可能给低收入家庭带来经济负担。
items.whyImportant: 新法案的实施对医疗系统的应急响应能力和伦理决策提出了新的挑战。

items.title: Yemen’s Houthis claim attacks on Red Sea tankers as US launches 12th night of strikes on Iran – Middle East crisis live
items.summary: US military says it is degrading Tehran’s ability to threaten ships in strait of Hormuz; Houthis say tankers violated their blockade; US signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia Earlier in the US day, before Iran’s Revolutionary Guard said it had stopped three oil tankers from passing through the strait of Hormuz, Donald Trump issued this threat on his Truth Social platform: From this point forward, any time the Islamic Republic of Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz, whether it be by Missile, Rocket, Drone, or any other device or weapon, the United States will bomb and destroy ONE BRIDGE OR POWER PLANT, including those located next to, or in, the Capital City of Tehran. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 也门胡塞武装声称袭击红海油轮，美国对伊朗发动第12晚打击——中东危机直播
items.summaryZh: 美国军方表示正在削弱伊朗威胁霍尔木兹海峡航运的能力。胡塞武装声称袭击油轮是为了执行封锁，同时美国与沙特签署了核协议。
items.whyImportant: 中东局势的复杂化和军事对抗的持续，对全球能源供应安全构成了直接威胁。

items.title: Trump threatens to bomb Iranian bridge or power plant after Hormuz attacks
items.summary: US President Donald Trump threatened on Wednesday to destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant each time Tehran attacks a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating Washington’s response as the conflict spread across the region and placed another major shipping route at risk. The warning came hours before Trump was due to attend the return of four US service members killed in Iranian attacks and related operations in Jordan and Iraq. “From this point forward, any time the Islamic Republic of Iran...
items.titleZh: 特朗普威胁称，在霍尔木兹海峡袭击事件后将轰炸伊朗桥梁或发电厂
items.summaryZh: 特朗普威胁称，伊朗每袭击一次霍尔木兹海峡的船只，美国就将摧毁伊朗的一座桥梁或发电厂。此言论进一步加剧了地区紧张局势。
items.whyImportant: 美国总统的直接军事威胁标志着美伊对抗进入了更加危险的阶段。

items.title: US tariffs ‘strengthen’ Lula against Bolsonaro’s son in upcoming elections
items.summary: With Lula polling ahead and tariffs squeezing Brazil's economy, the Bolsonaro family's Washington strategy is faltering.
items.titleZh: 美国关税“加强”了卢拉在即将到来的选举中对抗博索纳罗之子的地位
items.summaryZh: 由于美国关税政策对巴西经济造成压力，博索纳罗家族的对美策略受到质疑。民调显示卢拉目前处于领先地位。
items.whyImportant: 外部贸易压力正在重塑巴西国内的政治格局和选举走向。

items.title: South Korea charges former US diplomat with defaming Lee Jae Myung
items.summary: South Korean prosecutors have charged Korean-American professor Morse Tan for criminal defamation over false claims targeting President Lee Jae Myung. The Seoul Central District Prosecutors’ Office reportedly indicted Tan without detention on Thursday on multiple defamation charges. Tan, who served as the US ambassador-at-large for global criminal justice under the first Donald Trump administration, is accused of spreading false allegations during a press conference in Washington last year. He...
items.titleZh: 韩国指控前美国外交官诽谤李在明
items.summaryZh: 韩国检察机关以刑事诽谤罪起诉了韩裔美国教授莫尔斯·谭。他被指控在华盛顿的新闻发布会上散布针对李在明的虚假指控。
items.whyImportant: 此案涉及跨国政治诽谤，对韩美政治关系及相关人物声誉产生了影响。

items.title: Scottish Labour’s rivals decry ‘chancer’ Anas Sarwar for resigning to join Andy Burnham’s government
items.summary: New prime minister has made Sarwar – the first senior Labour figure to call for Keir Starmer’s resignation – a peer Scottish Labour’s rivals in Holyrood have slammed Anas Sarwar’s shock decision to resign as leader to sit in Andy Burnham’s new government, calling him a “chancer” and accusing him of lying to voters. The prime minister has made Sarwar – who was the first senior Labour figure to call for Keir Starmer to resign – a peer and given him a ministerial post at the Department for Business, Innovation, Science and Trade, No 10 announced on Wednesday. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 苏格兰工党竞争对手谴责阿纳斯·萨瓦尔辞职加入安迪·伯纳姆政府是“投机者”
items.summaryZh: 阿纳斯·萨瓦尔辞去苏格兰工党领袖职务，加入安迪·伯纳姆的新政府并担任部长。此举遭到政敌的猛烈抨击，指责其欺骗选民。
items.whyImportant: 这一人事变动引发了苏格兰政坛的剧烈震荡，并对工党的内部团结提出了质疑。
